zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Joan Stewart of Albany於1379年出生在蘇格蘭費伏法爾可藍德時，她的父親Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany39歲，母親Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith45歲。她和Robert Stewart 1st Lord Lorn至少有5個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1439年在蘇格蘭阿吉爾享年60歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾斯爾登東納爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Joan Stewart of Albany于1379年出生在苏格兰費伏法爾可藍德时，她的父亲Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany39岁，母亲Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith45岁。她和Robert Stewart 1st Lord Lorn至少有5个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1439年在苏格兰阿吉爾享年60岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾斯爾登東納爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Stewart
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: originally an occupational name for an administrative official of an estate, from Middle English stiward, Old English stigweard, stīweard, a compound of stig ‘house(hold)’ + weard ‘guardian’. In the Anglo-Saxon period this title was used of an officer controlling the domestic affairs of a household, especially of the royal household; after the Norman Conquest it was also used more widely as the native equivalent of Seneschal, for the steward of a manor or manager of an estate. In Scotland the term was also used of a magistrate originally appointed by the king to administer crown lands, forming a stewartry.

History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland, the royal family of Scotland from the 14th century, and of England from 1603, when James VI of Scotland acceded to the English throne as James I. There were many minor branches of the family left in Britain after the flight of James II in 1688, but not every bearer of the surname can claim relationship with the royal house, even in Scotland. Every great house in medieval England and Scotland had its steward, and in many cases the office gave rise to a hereditary surname. The fall of the house of Stuart in Britain, conversely, led to the establishment of several highly placed branches bearing this surname in continental Europe, which are in most cases related to the old Scottish royal family.

variants.name: Stuart
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire and Banffshire): variant of   Stewart  . This French form of the name, there being no W in the French language, was adopted by Mary, Queen of Scots, on her return to Scotland in 1561 and has since come to be more popular among royalists than the earlier spellings.
History: Stuart or Stewart is the surname of one of the great families of Scotland (see note at   Stewart  ).

variants.name: Stewardson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Westmorland): patronymic from Middle English stiward ‘steward’ (see Stewart ) + -son ‘son of the steward’.

variants.name: Steward
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Stewart  .

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Joan Stewart of Albany was born in 1379, in Falkland, Fife, Scotland, her father, Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany, was 39 and her mother, Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith, was 45. She had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with Robert Stewart 1st Lord Lorn. She died in 1439, in Argyll, Scotland, at the age of 60, and was buried in Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Joan Stewart of Albany est née en 1379, à Falkland, Fife, Écosse, son père, Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith, avait 45 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles avec Robert Stewart 1st Lord Lorn. Elle est décédée en 1439, à Argyll, Écosse, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Dundonald, Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Joan Stewart of Albany 1379 in Falkland, Fife, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany 39 und ihre Mutter Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith 45. Sie hatte mit Robert Stewart 1st Lord Lorn mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1439 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Argyll, Scotland und wurde in Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Joan Stewart of Albany è nata il nel 1379 nel Falkland, Fife, Scotland, sua padre, Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith, aveva 45 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie con Robert Stewart 1st Lord Lorn. Morì nel 1439, nel Argyll, Scotland, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Joan Stewart of Albanyが1379年にスコットランドフィフファルクランドで生まれた時，父Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albanyは39歳，母Margaret Graham Countess of Menteithは45歳であった。彼女はRobert Stewart 1st Lord Lornとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1439年にスコットランドアルグイルで60歳で死去し，スコットランドエイルシュアイアダンドナルドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Joan Stewart of Albany(이)가 1379년 스컷랜드 피프 파클랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 Robert Stewart 1st Lord Lorn(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1439년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에이르실르 던도널드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Joan Stewart of Albany nasceu em 1379, em Falkland, Fife, Scotland, seu pai, Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith, tinha 45 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas com Robert Stewart 1st Lord Lorn. Ela faleceu em 1439, em Argyll, Scotland, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Joan Stewart of Albany родилась в 1379 г. в местности фалкланд, фиф, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith, 45. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери от Robert Stewart 1st Lord Lorn. Она умерла в 1439 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности дундональд, аиршир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Joan Stewart of Albany nació en 1379, en Falkland, Fife, Scotland, su papá, Robert Stewart 1st Duke of Albany, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Margaret Graham Countess of Menteith, tenía 45 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas con Robert Stewart 1st Lord Lorn. Murió en 1439, en Argyll, Scotland, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Dundonald, Ayrshire, Scotland.
